subject: Vanillite, a small ice-cream-cone-like Pokemon with a white snowy head and blue eyes, standing in a snowy pine forest at night
description: A small round creature resembling a soft ice-cream scoop with a snowy white body and a crystalline cone-like lower form stands in a snow-covered forest at night. Pine trees dusted with snow frame the background. Sparkling light effects suggest ice crystals or snow flurries in the air. The palette is cool white, pale blue, and dark wintry tones with soft sparkle highlights.
foreground: small round snowy creature with cone base in snow
background: snow-covered pine forest, night sky, ice sparkles
